mcqs.question: What is the primary goal of the Evolutionary Process?

options.text: To create a prototype
To develop a software system in a linear and sequential manner
To manage and control the development of a software system
To test and refine a software system

mcqs.explanation: The primary goal of the Evolutionary Process is to manage and control the development of a software system.

mcqs.question: What is the main advantage of the Prototyping approach?

options.text: It allows for flexibility and adaptability in the development process
It is a cost-effective approach
It allows for the creation of a preliminary version of a software system
It is a time-consuming and expensive approach

mcqs.explanation: The main advantage of the Prototyping approach is that it allows for the creation of a preliminary version of a software system.

mcqs.question: What is the primary goal of the Spiral Model?

options.text: To manage and control the development of a software system
To create a prototype
To develop a software system in a linear and sequential manner
To combine elements of the Waterfall and Prototyping models

mcqs.explanation: The primary goal of the Spiral Model is to combine elements of the Waterfall and Prototyping models.

mcqs.question: What is the main disadvantage of the Evolutionary Process?

options.text: It is a time-consuming and expensive approach
It does not allow for flexibility and adaptability in the development process
It is a complex approach
It does not allow for the creation of a preliminary version of a software system

mcqs.explanation: The main disadvantage of the Evolutionary Process is that it can be a time-consuming and expensive approach.

mcqs.question: What is the primary goal of testing in the SDLC?

options.text: To ensure that the software system meets the required specifications
To test and refine a software system
To create a prototype
To manage and control the development of a software system

mcqs.explanation: The primary goal of testing in the SDLC is to ensure that the software system meets the required specifications.
